body.objective: Create a scoped commit for the validated real-worker/fleet control-plane work without staging unrelated local env drift.
constraints: Do not stage secrets, local env files, generated outputs or unrelated dirty files.
acceptance_criteria: git diff --cached --stat contains only intended files.
Remaining dirty/untracked files are listed separately.

body.objective: Run workstation live smoke for committed runtime contracts, swarm status, fleet cockpit and Goals/Loops worker controls.
constraints: MacBook dashboard is cockpit only; workstation remains execution node.
Do not start workers unless explicitly requested.
Capture endpoint responses and dashboard route evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard Fleet Cockpit matches API data.
Scheduler safe tick can run without starting workers.

body.objective: Run bounded real Codex/OpenCode maker/checker smoke on temp DB/temp repo with artifacts, traces, checkpoints and token evidence.
constraints: Use temp DB and temp repo only.
Do not merge, push or deploy.
Runtime contract drift must block before spawn.
Hard timeout and token budgets are required.
acceptance_criteria: Codex smoke completes or blocks with actionable contract evidence.
OpenCode smoke completes or blocks with actionable contract evidence.
Successful smoke reaches ready_for_human_merge after checks and checker verdict.
Trace spans, checkpoints, stdout/stderr and token usage evidence are recorded.

body.objective: Build the policy-gated worker pool runner that can plan, start-next, drain and stop prepared workers under capacity and risk gates.
constraints: High-risk work requires security or human gate.
Runner must respect runtime availability, recommended concurrency, token budget and wall-clock budget.
No merge, push, deploy, secret mutation or data deletion.
acceptance_criteria: Runner plan lists eligible, blocked and running leases with reasons.
start-next starts at most one allowed prepared lease.
drain starts only allowed leases up to recommended concurrency.
Tests cover low-risk allowed, high-risk blocked, runtime unavailable, low capacity, token exhausted and timeout stop.
